name: telegram-bot-api
description: OctoBus package for Telegram Bot API token validation and text message notification.

Telegram_Bot_API.Telegram_Bot_API/GetMe.name: get-me
Telegram_Bot_API.Telegram_Bot_API/GetMe.description: Validate the configured Telegram bot token.

Telegram_Bot_API.Telegram_Bot_API/SendMe.name: send-message
Telegram_Bot_API.Telegram_Bot_API/SendMe.description: Send a text message through Telegram Bot API.
